message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 基于GitHub的实验管理平台--学生列表用例的顺序图

actor users

participant "首页" as homepage
participant "登录" as login
participant "选择登录身份" as selectRole

users -> homepage : 查看所有学生列表

alt 如果users是老师
    homepage -> login
    login -> selectRole
else 如果users是students
    homepage -> login
    login -> selectRole
end

@enduml
```
